transcript: So I want to start with a simple idea first. So we all know money move the worlds. But the worlds actually still struggling to move the money. Remember last time when you try to send some money to your cousin overseas, right, you try to open a bank account in a new country, when you try to make a cross-border payments that need to be clear on time? It's not easy. It take times, right, it you have to pay a lot more than you have to pay domestically, so it's quite frustrating. So that's why we come up the phrase that the invisible tax on the money movement. Which... So all the waiting, all the spread, all the intermediary, the manual check, all the costs, the friction, they are exist, but not because the money is broken. It's actually because the system behind the money is outdated. So how we gonna change that? I think we all know that there's over half of a billion people they already have a crypto. And the stablecoin are today able to trade US dollar trillions a year. And the speed and also the global access is all possible. But there's one thing that there's not a lot of discussion about that, which is that stablecoins really advanced, but the system connecting to stablecoin actually did not. That's why we come out a vision. So we believe the world, the business, they actually don't need another currency, they actually need a new architecture. And the stablecoin, they are not a new currency. It is actually a new architecture for money. So I would like to introduce USDGO. So we just officially announced today. We will release this USDGO. So we just want to make sure everybody understand that what we try to do. We are not just launching another stablecoin. What we try to do is like we want to launch a regulated stablecoin platform which is represent a payment infrastructure can allow the business, institution, they can move the money quite easy with a better experience. So we have our partner, I think a lot of people quite familiar with Anchorage. So Anchorage, they are the first federally chartered national bank in US. And they will take care of the issuance and the custody so that we make sure that all our stablecoin are fully compliance and also is one-to-one backed. And OSL, so we will take care of the rest. We will focus on the distribution, we focus on the liquidities, we also, most importantly, we will be try to do the real-world integrations. So one highlight I want to mention is like we actually not try to compete with any other stablecoins. What we try to do is like we want to build a stablecoin infrastructure that can work with everybody, that can make other stablecoin more usable at a greater scale. Why we can do that? We are the first licensed exchange in Hong Kong and we also are the Asia and also global trading and payment platform. With the acquisition of Banser, we have 50 license and the registration across the 10 regions. So that really enable us to connect lot of banks with the blockchain instantly settlement. And this new architecture need of course need a new highway, so that's why we chosen Solana as our preferred partner. We believe the global infrastructure need a unique Solana feature: the high performance, lower fee, a strong community, and also a reliability at a global scale. And we want to put everything into a real applications. Right, so we build this OSL BizPay together at our stablecoin infrastructure that powered by the Solana. So you as a business owner or you as a institution, you can easily just plug in our service and then enjoy all the future with the lower transaction cost, with the higher yield and also with the more liquidities. So we want to make a stablecoin so simple for everybody. So in OSL, we believe the next decade of a finance is not defined by a single token or single currency. It is actually defined by a new architecture that can finally remove the invisible tax when we try to move the money. And we believe the stablecoin is the default rail that can move all the assets across payment, trading, treasury and the custody. And we are building this future not only as a crypto exchanges, but as a licensed global payment platform that powered by the blockchain. Thank you everybody.

# OSL Group Launches Global Exchange Services, Introducing Zero-Slippage Fiat Gateway
Aug 24, 2025
Share
* * []()
* [](https://t.me/osl_com)
* []()
25 August 2025 -[OSL Group](http://www.osl.com)(HKEX: 863.HK) today announced the official launching of[OSL](https://www.osl.com/en), its global exchange sevices, marking a pivotal milestone in the company’s global compliance-driven expansion strategy. The international platform initially debuts with efficient fiat-to-stablecoin conversion and fund settlement services, with plans to introduce derivatives, lending and other products for retail and institutional clients worldwide.
Rising blockchain complexity and stablecoin saturation exposes users to risks, ranging from tedious transaction paths, high slippage, to slow settlement, and even restricted withdrawals or frozen accounts. OSL Group's global exchange platform addresses these pain points with a one-click fiat gateway, enabling zero-slippage instant conversion between USDC and USD at a 1:1 ratio, streamlines fund transfers with transparency and speed. Users can also receive limited-time BTC rewards by trading other major assets.
Backed by OSL Group’s international licenses, compliant clearing capabilities, direct banking network, and liquidity support from strategic market makers, the global exchange extends well beyond USDC-USD trading. Users can purchase crypto via credit card and Apple Pay, transfer funds through bank rails, and manage assets across multiple chains. It will also provide conversion services between a wider range of fiat currencies and major stablecoins, accommodating diverse deposit and withdrawal requirements while ensuring transparent pricing, low slippage, and fast settlement.
Chagri Poyraz, Chief Strategy Officer of OSL Global Exchange, said:
"As an industry-leading global compliant digital financial infrastructure platform, OSL Group prioritizes user needs and understands the challenges of global capital flow and asset management. By addressing key pain points, our global exchange has significantly enhanced digital assets' trading efficiency and security. Moving forward, OSL Group will continue to leverage its international licenses and compliance strengths to deepen the global expansion strategy, build cross-border connections, and foster a sustainable digital finance ecosystem, driving the industry toward a more compliant and efficient future."
About OSL Group
OSL Group (HKEX: 863.HK) is a leading global financial infrastructure platform bridging traditional finance and the digital asset economy through blockchain technology. The Group is dedicated to providing efficient, seamless, and regulatory-compliant financial services to individuals and businesses worldwide.
OSL delivers a comprehensive suite of regulated services through its licensed platforms, including 24/7 OTC brokerage with deep liquidity fiat gateways and competitive pricing; omnibus brokerage solutions enabling traditional financial institutions to integrate digital assets; SOC 2 Type 2-certified custody with up to US$1 billion insurance protection; and compliant retail trading channels; wealth management solutions, including scheduled launches on tokenised treasuries and RWAs; and in preparation for cross-border payment infrastructure via OSL Pay.
"Open, Secure, Licensed" are the principles OSL lives by. OSL is expanding its compliant infrastructure across Japan, Australia, and Europe, potentially Southeast Asia, powering the next generation of global financial infrastructure.

tags.impact_reason: A regulated stablecoin platform (USDGO) by OSL with Anchorage Digital as custodian introduces a new payment infrastructure, but its impact on the Solana ecosystem is not immediately clear or significant.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a futuristic architectural bridge as the Semantic Anchor because the story is about creating a new 'architecture' and 'infrastructure' that bridges regulated US banking (Anchorage) with Asian distribution (OSL). The bridge physically represents this connection and the seamless, low-friction flow of value, directly addressing the 'outdated system' mentioned. I included the text 'USDGO' as a diegetic holographic projection from the bridge itself to clearly brand this new infrastructure in a high-tech, 'Wired' style.
visual_idea.description: A dramatic, low-angle view of a massive, glowing architectural bridge made of semi-transparent polymer. It emerges from a monumental, secure building of polished concrete and steel (representing US regulation) and extends across a dark digital void towards a distant, neon-lit Asian cityscape. Pulsating lines of pure cyan light flow through the bridge, representing data and value. A clean, minimalist holographic projection of the text 'USDGO' is emitted from the bridge's surface, hovering just above its center. The background is a dark, clean void, emphasizing the scale and importance of this new connection.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A dramatic, low-angle vertical composition, emphasizing monumental height and epic scale against a vast negative space at the top. The central subject is a massive, glowing architectural bridge, meticulously constructed from semi-transparent polymer. Pulsating lines of pure cyan light flow dynamically and organically through the bridge's translucent polymer structure, visually representing the movement of data and value. This grand architectural infrastructure emerges from a formidable, secure building of polished concrete and gleaming steel, symbolically representing US regulation. The bridge extends powerfully across a profound, dark digital void, reaching towards a distant, intricately detailed, neon-lit Asian cityscape. A clean, minimalist holographic projection of the text 'USDGO' is emitted directly from the bridge's surface, hovering with a vibrant, ethereal glow just above its center, a tangible element in the scene. The overall background is an expansive, clean, and intensely dark void, meticulously emphasizing the immense scale and critical importance of this new, vital connection. Light reflects sharply off the polished concrete, creating specular highlights. The scene benefits from photorealistic lighting and intricate architectural details. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, volumetric lighting, HDR, architectural photography, futuristic realism.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a futuristic architectural bridge as the Semantic Anchor because the story is about creating a new 'architecture' and 'infrastructure' that bridges regulated US banking (Anchorage) with Asian distribution (OSL). The bridge physically represents this connection and the seamless, low-friction flow of value, directly addressing the 'outdated system' mentioned. I included the text 'USDGO' as a diegetic holographic projection from the bridge itself to clearly brand this new infrastructure in a high-tech, 'Wired' style.
visual_idea.description: A macro, abstract close-up of the bridge's internal structure. We see the flawless, translucent polymer casing, with intricate channels of glowing fiber optics inside. Streams of pure cyan and white light pulse and weave through these channels in an orderly, complex pattern, representing the secure and efficient flow of the stablecoin. The lighting is internal and emissive, creating a sense of advanced, clean technology. NO TEXT.

The entire 1:1 square frame is filled with the flawless, highly polished, translucent polymer casing, meticulously designed as intricate architectural infrastructure, reminiscent of polished concrete's smooth reflectivity. Inside, intricate channels of glowing fiber optics are visible, through which streams of pure cyan and white light pulse and weave in an orderly, complex, symmetrical pattern, creating a vibrant holographic glow. This internal, emissive lighting represents the secure and efficient flow of a stablecoin, creating a sense of advanced, clean technology with sharp reflections and specular highlights. No text. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, ultra-photorealistic, high dynamic range.

editorial.headline: OSL and Anchorage Digital Launch Regulated USDGO on Solana
editorial.standfirst: Hong Kong’s OSL Group partners with the first federally chartered US crypto bank to deploy a compliant stablecoin infrastructure. This strategic alignment targets the "invisible tax" on global money movement by merging US regulatory safety with Asian distribution rails.
key_takeaways: **Strategic Trinity:** **OSL Group** (Distribution), **Anchorage Digital** (Issuer), and **Solana** (Network) align to deliver a US-regulated stablecoin with global reach.
**Regulatory Moat:** USDGO leverages Anchorage's US federal bank charter and OSL's 50+ licenses following its acquisition of **Banxa**.
**Enterprise Rail:** The launch includes **OSL BizPay**, a platform enabling institutions to utilize USDGO for instant, low-cost cross-border settlement.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
In a decisive move to bridge the gap between traditional banking safety and blockchain efficiency, **OSL Group** has unveiled **USDGO**, a US-regulated stablecoin designed to dismantle the "invisible tax" on global payments. The announcement at Solana Breakpoint 2025 reframes the stablecoin narrative: USDGO is not positioned merely as a trading asset, but as a new architectural layer for finance. By appointing **Anchorage Digital**—the first federally chartered crypto bank in the US—as the issuer, OSL ensures the asset meets the most stringent compliance and backing standards available, directly addressing institutional concerns regarding counterparty risk.

The initiative's "Alpha" lies in its robust distribution network. OSL is capitalizing on its recent acquisition of **Banxa**, which has expanded its regulatory footprint to over 50 licenses across 10 regions. This extensive compliance mesh allows OSL to serve as a global fiat-to-crypto gateway, facilitating deep liquidity and acceptance for USDGO. **Solana** has been selected as the launch network, providing the high-performance execution environment required to handle institutional throughput while minimizing the friction and costs associated with legacy payment rails.

To drive immediate utility, OSL simultaneously launched **OSL BizPay**, an enterprise-grade infrastructure that operationalizes USDGO for real-world business applications. BizPay allows corporations to bypass the delays and fees of the correspondent banking system, utilizing the stablecoin for treasury management and cross-border settlement. By combining a US bank charter for issuance, a Hong Kong-licensed exchange for distribution, and Solana's speed for settlement, OSL is effectively constructing a fully regulated, global value transfer network.
